items.title: Freelance Full-stack Developer
description: Built StudyHub, a social learning platform with real-time chat, study groups, and resource sharing using Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and Socket.IO.
Developed an Accounts Receivable Management System (ARMS) implementing Clean Architecture to digitize SME debt tracking with React and Node.js.
Designed and deployed a personal portfolio website with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion, featuring 3D elements and real-time chat.

items.title: Academic Projects
description: Contributed to an EV Charging Station Management System — a capstone microservices project with Kong API Gateway, RabbitMQ, Docker, and Postgres.
Built a Driver Drowsiness Alert System for real-time fatigue monitoring using computer vision techniques (Python, OpenCV).
Developed a web video translator with speech recognition and Vietnamese audio synthesis (React, Python backend).
